successCriteria.description: src/modules/health/health.model.ts exists and exports ProcessUptime interface with startTime, currentTime, uptimeSeconds properties and getUptime method
src/modules/health/health.service.ts exists and exports HealthService interface and HealthServiceImpl class
HealthServiceImpl implements HealthService interface with getUptime method that returns a Promise<number>
HealthServiceImpl correctly calculates uptime in seconds using Date.now() difference from process start time
All TypeScript interfaces compile without errors using the project's TypeScript configuration
ProcessUptime entity is a transient domain concept (not persisted) - no SQL table needed

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Health controller with RBAC and validation
Audit logging integration into uptime endpoint
Integration with existing employee, policy, balance, leave, or notification modules
